samples: c1345 het hbo (initialism of hoger beroepsonderwijs (“higher vocational education/training”), i.e. vocational school, (US) ± community college)
c1347 het mbo (initialism of middelbaar beroepsonderwijs (“intermediate vocational education/training”))
c989 last hebben van [phrase] → "to be bothered or irritated by, to have a problem with"
c1010 meeste (veel) [adj.] → "many, much, a lot of"
c196 de mensen en:[people] → "human, any member of the species Homo sapiens"
c294 gezellig en:[cosy] → "having an inviting and friendly ambiance; cozy, nice, pleasant, sociable, convivial"
c420 lekker en:[delicious] → "having a nice taste, tasty, delectable"
c672 meteen en:[right away] → "immediately; at once"
c731 op en:[on|on top] → "on, upon; indicates physical location"
c766 halen en:[to be in time for] → "to fetch, to get"
c781 ons en:[our (neuter)] → "our; first-person plural possessive determiner"
c836 vanaf en:[since] → "starting from, from onwards, as of, as from"
c895 weleens en:[sometimes] → "alternative form of wel eens"
c905 de oudste en:[eldest] → "old (having existed for a relatively long period of time)"
c971 drukken op en:[to push] → "to press"
c978 de pincode en:[pin (code of card)] → "personal identification number"
c989 last hebben van en:[to suffer from] → "to be bothered or irritated by, to have a problem with"
c993 passen op en:[to keep an eye on] → "to fit (have the right size)"
c1010 meeste (veel) en:[most] → "many, much, a lot of"
c1022 de folder en:[flyer|booklet] → "leaflet with information or advertising"
c1081 de jam en:[marmalade] → "jam (congealed sweet mixture of conserved fruits)"
c1131 heerlijk en:[delightful] → glossSummary:"wonderful (when referring to a sensation), great"
c1497 volgen en:[to attend] → glossSummary:"to follow (go after)"
c224 "dank je wel" → "thank you very much"
c251 "graag gedaan" → "you're welcome; my pleasure (after being thanked); literally: gladly done"
c351 "op slot" → "locked, secured by a lock"
c405 "eet smakelijk" → "enjoy your meal, bon appétit"
c570 "in orde" → "in order, correct, right, okay, as it should be"
c596 "'s nachts" → "during the night, in the night, at night"
c748 "tot straks" → "see you later (implies that you will see the person later the same day)"
c915 "gelijk hebben" → "to be right, to be correct (of a person)"
c989 "last hebben van" → "to be bothered or irritated by, to have a problem with"
c1216 "in plaats van" → "instead of, in place of"
